svg.text: one per JVM · double-checked volatile · interviewer reads first
snapshot into event at log time (async-safe!) · clear() in finally
immutable event ⇒ shareable across appenders + threads ✓
the model knows nothing about queues, filters or output — pure data
the API app code compiles against
new filter / formatter / appender = new class — LoggerImpl untouched (Open/Closed)
CHAIN → short-circuit on first reject (no wasted format/write)
LoggerImpl holds these in a CopyOnWriteArrayList — lock-free fan-out on the log() path, rare copy on reconfigure
LoggerImpl — async engine (Logger impl): the hot path
CALLER THREAD — int compare + offer() only, zero I/O
1 BACKGROUND CONSUMER — take() blocks, does all filter/format/I/O
implements Logger — the impl behind the seam
① caller → LogManager.getLogger → ② immutable event + LogLevel → ③ interface seams → ④ filter chain + formatter/appender strategies → ⑤ async engine hot path

g.text: Patterns: Chain of Responsibility · Strategy · Singleton · Decorator · Producer/Consumer
